arts.ttl: New manager hunt led Bilkul to Tony Mowbray after West Brom's area to upgrade revealed
arts.sum: West Bromwich Albion had Tony Mowbray in mind for months before Carlos Corberan's departure - and they proceeded with his appointment once all parties had established that the returning head coach was medically clear to return to work. Mowbray ticked an awful lot of boxes for Albion; not only were there the original ties with the club, of which many supporters still reflect fondly for the style of football and success on the pitch, but in the intervening period he has proven time and again at various clubs that he has been able to reinvent and tease strong performances and results from the squads he's worked with.

arts.ttl: Player at West Brom to complete transfer – Final stages after beating Championship competition
arts.sum: Isaac Price is currently at West Bromwich Albion to complete his move to the Championship club from Standard Liege. That’s according to journalist Sacha Tavolieri, who reports that the midfielder is now very close to sealing his move to the Hawthorns. The Baggies have pushed to sign Price over the past few days. They initially The post Player at West Brom to complete transfer – Final stages after beating Championship competition appeared first on Sport Witness.

arts.ttl: Middlesbrough 'irony' for Tony Mowbray as he details cancer battle ahead of West Brom return
arts.sum: “I don’t know if ironic is the right word, but the fact the first game is going to Middlesbrough - the place where I live, my family live, grew up there as a boy, played for 12 years…” Mowbray said. “The football family and the contact I have had from some, people I don't even know, Premier League managers contact you and the LMA, players, it has been an avalanche of love coming my way.

arts.ttl: Tony Mowbray return delight, West Brom prep and Michael Carrick's Middlesbrough admission
arts.sum: “It's fantastic to see Tony healthy, well, back in the game, in a good job in a big role after the challenging months that he's had and his family have had to face and come through,” Carrick said, previewing the match. “We need to do that for a lot longer and finish games off and be in a position where we're picking up more points.

arts.ttl: Michael Carrick addresses Seny Dieng's Middlesbrough future amid Tom Glover decision
arts.sum: Though back in the Boro squad on Saturday at Portsmouth and fit enough to play, Carrick admitted the decision to keep Glover in was based on merit, and appeared to confirm the Australian will retain his place on Tuesday evening when West Brom visit. Michael Carrick didn’t rule out a Seny Dieng Middlesbrough exit this month, as he admitted Tom Glover is being selected ahead of him right now.
